metadata.name: Create a Virtual Tour for a Listing

description: To enhance marketing, a listing agent arranges for a 3D virtual tour of a property.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a 3D photographer (e.g., Matterport provider) to scan the property.
Receive the completed virtual tour link from the photographer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the final virtual tour URL.

nodes.task_description: Add the virtual tour link to the MLS listing and share it on social media.

expected_outcome.value: The virtual tour is successfully integrated into the property's marketing materials.
